Log:
  Update CyberChef from 9.7.6  to 9.7.7

  OGG Video
  lzop compressed
  TCP Packet
  UDP Packet
  Compiled HTML
  Windows Password
  Bitlocker recovery key
  Certificate
  PGP pubring
  PGP secring
  PGP Safe
  Task Scheduler
  Windows Shortcut (lnk)
